databrew.dataset.formatoptions.CfnAbout: Represents a set of options that define the structure of either comma-separated value (CSV), Excel, or JSON input.

databrew.dataset.formatoptions.Csv.Description: Options that define how CSV input is to be interpreted by DataBrew.

databrew.dataset.formatoptions.Excel.Description: Options that define how Excel input is to be interpreted by DataBrew.

databrew.dataset.formatoptions.Json.Description: Options that define how JSON input is to be interpreted by DataBrew.
